overall.description: A cinematic, atmospheric shot of a misty forest field at night with heavy blue-green color grading. The camera remains largely stationary with minimal panning, capturing a dark silhouette of a large animal in the middle distance against dense evergreen trees. The scene maintains a consistent ominous mood with low visibility due to fog.

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of a foggy forest field, slowly panning right to follow the distant landscape

notable_agents.action: large dark quadruped silhouette, possibly a bear, standing still or moving slowly within the misty field

entered.detail: dense silhouette of tall pine or fir trees forming the backdrop against the night sky
open field of tall grass in the foreground, appearing dark teal under the night lighting
atmospheric fog hanging low over the field, reducing visibility and creating a hazy atmosphere
dark irregular shape on the right side of the tree line, possibly rocks or fallen logs

segments.scene_description: The camera holds a steady, atmospheric shot of a foggy forest clearing at night. A dense wall of evergreen trees forms the backdrop while mist hangs over the grassy field. A large dark animal silhouette stands motionless in the center distance, barely visible through the haze. The camera slowly pans right, revealing more of the tree line and a distant rock formation that gradually moves closer in the frame.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow, atmospheric pan across a nocturnal forest clearing that gradually reveals the hidden contours of a misty landscape. It begins with a steady view of a grassy field shrouded in heavy fog, where a dense wall of evergreen trees looms in the background. As the camera lingers, a large, dark animal silhouette remains motionless in the center distance, barely discernible through the thick haze. The scene then shifts as the camera slowly pans right, expanding the view of the tree line and bringing a distant rock formation progressively closer into the frame.
